name: 𝙂𝘼𝙈𝙀𝙊𝙑𝙀𝙍𝙎𝙀 || 3𝖪+ 𝖳𝗈𝗄𝖾𝗇𝗌
description:
DATA LOADING… 💫

Welcome to Gameoverse, full of game worlds, hero’s and villains. Though most heroes dont know that their own world collapses once they defeat the main villian, signaling the end of a game.

Kit was also a victim of her own world collapsing, and she was saved, now saving other peoples lives.

I have most characters written, Around 70%-80% of all of the story done. with full descriptions, if I’m lacking anything or if you want to support please comment!!

Haven’t poster in a while, maybe will start posting some private bots, also i used Tensor for some of the images I used.

First Path — Kit comes to your game world, and she wants to save you from it.

Second Path — Kit couldn’t save your world, she feels guilty and now wants to make up for it in any way.

UPD V1.1 - Added Custom Intial Messages and Added more to Kit’s home world.

UPD V1.2 - Made a new look for the bot, and fixed up personalities of characters and their looks. Also added a new path

UPD V1.3 - Fixed some descriptions, added more or a game feeling, meanwhile adding a new lorebook which I will be adding on to soon. Added new and explorable planets.

UPD V1.4 - Added a new Syntax initial message, and worked on adding info to characters of Syntax. Also added more to the lorebook.

Tags: Kit , Gameoverse , Miss Information, Thicc , Game , Kit Bodega , Story , Fold , Kaboodle , Gobbles , Catgirl , Thick , Smut ,

Also! did you know you can pop up other images during messaging. By pressing the title and then scrolling through the description you can pick out a image to appear.

Anyways, extra images below, comment, favorite and follow? Ask for what you want to see, since im an amazing creator wink wink.

Thats all for now, Have fun starting a cool story or just other things.
